creator: jsnader@ix.netcom.com
text:
After running TeX to produce a .dvi file, MakeTeXPK is invoked to make the
	fonts (.pk). gftopk aborts with the message ``-v option is ambiguous...''

Fix: 

Change line 149 of /usr/local/bin/MakeTeXPK to:

		gftopk --verbose ./$GFNAME ./$PKNAME
How-To-Repeat: 
	Problem occurs anytime xdvi (and presumably any font making event)
	is run.
